## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on potential GrowthX and Motivosity partnership for content strategy and SEO improvement](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Motivosity has significant headroom for SEO growth compared to competitors, particularly in non-branded search](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes a strategy sprint to build artifacts, roadmap, and calibrate content, followed by execution in 2-3 focused lanes](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Key opportunities include content refreshing, video repurposing, and addressing competitor gaps](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Motivosity seeks a proposal with projected success metrics over 6-12 months to champion internally](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Status and Opportunities

  - [Motivosity has lower non-branded search traffic compared to competitors](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Authority score (38) is sufficient for driving more traffic](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Recent efforts to identify relevant terms and create messaging pillars](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Opportunity to develop thought leadership content on employee engagement and company culture](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)

### Content Strategy and Repurposing

  - [Potential to repurpose webinar and video content into articles and other formats](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Emphasis on telling a story and supporting it with customized workflows](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Opportunity to refresh existing content and consolidate topics for better performance](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [Importance of content freshness for SEO and AI citations](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)

### AI and SEO Considerations

  - [Growing importance of AI-generated overviews (GEO) in search results](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Need to improve third-party citations for better AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Discussion of tools like Scrunch for tracking AI prompts and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)

### Proposed Engagement Structure

  - [Start with a strategy sprint to build artifacts and roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [Focus on 2-3 high-conviction lanes for growth, plus an experimentation lane](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Potential lanes: video repurposing, manager playbooks, content refreshing](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Aim to maximize signals and adapt strategy quickly](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

### Motivosity's Unique Position

  - [Bootstrapped company since 2013, focusing on fiscal responsibility and high retention](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Strong product differentiation based on psychology of connection and culture-building](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Smaller team (80 employees) compared to larger competitors, but punching above weight](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to prepare a proposal with projected plan and success metrics over 6-12 months](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Include competitor analysis (potentially swapping Kudos for AwardCo)](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Kyle to send proposal with Loom video explanation early next week](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Stephen to review during vacation and company trip](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
  - [Aim to make a decision within the next couple of weeks to potentially start in August](https://fathom.video/share/MtvB9zysAUBMY7sdgt3bekpXvzm9UtY2?tab=summary&timestamp=2207.0)
